prompt: A telemetry wall: a dense regular grid of agent status cells — most filled 'active', some marked terminated, a few 'init' — with engraved column readouts, uptime and latency figures and tolerances down the side. monochrome black ink line drawing on warm off-white paper #EDE9E5, a single brick-orange #E05A2B accent only, corner registration crosshairs, datum target triangles, dimension tolerances and an ISO-style title block; no colour anywhere except the one orange accent.
